exam.title: MSc Admission Test Preparation
instructions: Answer all questions of the following fifty questions.
The figures shown in the right margin indicate full marks. There are no negative markings.

questions.question: What will be the value of z?
Find output:
What is the output of the following C code?
How many times recursive function calls for the following code?
Which of the following OOP mechanisms explicitly ensures data security by preventing direct outside access to data members, allowing manipulation only through a well-defined public interface?

Consider the following declaration block in a standard C++ application. If no access modifier is explicitly mentioned, what is the default accessibility profile of the member variable roll and the function setRoll()?

options.c: roll is private and setRoll() is public

questions.question: Which component of the Java Development Kit (JDK) is explicitly responsible for translating human-readable .java source files into platform-independent .class bytecode files?
Consider the following Java code snippet. What will be the exact console output?
Which of the following conditions must be met for a Java interface to be targeted and safely instantiated using a standard Lambda expression?

options.a: It must contain only private helper methods.
options.b: It must contain exactly one abstract method.
options.c: It must extend the Runnable interface.
options.d: It must be marked explicitly with the final keyword modifier.

questions.question: A graph has 24 edges and degree of each vertex is k, then which of the following is possible number of vertices?
What is the minimum number of people required in a room to guarantee that at least two of them share the exact same birth month?
Consider the compound proposition (p ∧ q) → p. Which of the following best describes this logical statement?

options.d: It is valid only when p is false.

questions.question: Which data structure is primarily used to implement Breadth-First Search (BFS) traversal of a graph?
If the inorder traversal of a binary tree is B, A, C and its preorder traversal is A, B, C, what is the postorder traversal of the tree?
Which data structure is ideal for checking balanced parentheses in an expression (e.g., matching opening and closing brackets)?
What is the tightest upper bound (O) of the following loop block?
Using the Master Method, what is the asymptotic time complexity of the recurrence relation T(n) = 2T(n/2) + Theta(n)?
What is the worst-case time complexity of the Quick Sort algorithm when the pivot chosen is consistently the smallest or largest element?
The Longest Common Subsequence (LCS) problem is efficiently solved using which of the following approaches?
Which of the following single-source shortest path algorithms can correctly handle graphs containing negative weight edges, provided there are no negative weight cycles?
Which of the following issues in a traditional file processing system is directly caused by the lack of central control over data storage and formatting?

options.b: Poor execution speed of sequential searches
options.d: Inability to store text files alongside numeric data

questions.question: The Relational Algebra operator that outputs all tuples from relation R that do not have a matching match in relation S across shared attributes is known as:
If a relation is in 2nd Normal Form (2NF), which of the following vulnerabilities has been completely eliminated?

options.b: Partial functional dependencies on a candidate key

questions.question: In a standard B+ Tree index structure used by database storage engines, actual data record pointers or actual data rows are exclusively stored in which locations?

options.d: Evenly distributed across all levels of the tree

questions.question: An attacker intercepts network traffic to analyze packet headers and discover communication patterns between two servers without altering the data. This is an example of which type of attack?
What is the primary objective of a Domain Name System (DNS) poisoning attack?

options.a: To intercept session cookies from a user's browser
options.b: To corrupt database tables by injecting malicious SQL code
options.c: To redirect users to a malicious website by modifying IP mapping records
options.d: To flood a server with synchronization requests to crash it

questions.question: Which type of malware appears to be a legitimate, useful software application but performs malicious actions in the background when executed by the user?

A communication channel is completely noiseless and has a bandwidth of 4 kHz. If the digital signal uses 4 discrete voltage levels to represent data, what is the maximum bit rate achievable according to the Nyquist formula?
Which physical topology requires a central controller or hub to which all dedicated links from devices are connected, offering easy installation but presenting a single point of failure?
Which line coding scheme has no DC component and provides synchronization?
What is the primary function of ARP?

options.a: Find MAC address from IP address
options.b: Find IP address from MAC address

questions.question: Which protocol allows users to keep emails on the mail server and synchronize multiple devices?
Which routing algorithm requires each router to have complete knowledge of the network topology?
In the instruction cycle, which step comes immediately after fetching an instruction?
A processor has a clock rate of 2 GHz and an average CPI of 2. What is the execution time for 1000 instructions?
In the classic 5-stage MIPS pipeline, which stage performs arithmetic and logical operations?
Which instruction format generally requires the fewest bits to specify operands?
Which design pattern ensures that only one instance of a class exists throughout the system?
Which software development model is primarily risk-driven?
Which development approach welcomes changing requirements even at a late stage of development?
In the FCFS scheduling algorithm, the main disadvantage is:

options.c: Convoy effect due to long processes

questions.question: Three processes arrive at time 0 with burst times: P1 = 8 ms, P2 = 4 ms, P3 = 2 ms. According to the Shortest Job First (SJF) scheduling algorithm, which process executes first?
Which page replacement algorithm can never produce more page faults when the number of page frames is increased?
Which of the following grammars is NOT LL(1)?
Which of the following statements is TRUE regarding DFA and NFA?

options.a: Every NFA can be converted to an equivalent DFA.
options.b: Every DFA can recognize more languages than an NFA.
options.c: NFA requires less memory during execution than DFA in all cases.
options.d: DFA may have multiple transitions for the same input symbol from a state.

questions.question: Which of the following is the simplified form of F(A, B) = Σm(1, 2, 3)?
The carry-out C_out of a full adder is equal to:
In the Minimax algorithm with Alpha-Beta pruning, pruning occurs when:

options.b: Beta becomes less than or equal to Alpha

questions.question: Which of the following best describes overfitting in a machine learning model?

options.a: Model performs well on both training and unseen data
options.b: Model is too simple to capture data patterns
options.c: Model performs well on training data but poorly on unseen data

questions.question: Two fair dice are rolled. What is the probability that the sum is 7?
